spec_match.rationale: Excellent conceptual demonstration that helps developers visualize what unspokenPunctuation does under the hood by applying explicit grammatical inference rules and rendering a green-highlighted diff.

interactive.rationale: Highly interactive, combining interactive preset loaders, responsive text diffing, view mode togglers, and live list of applied rules.

edge_cases.rationale: Contains clear disclaimer notes on the simulation model limits, and safely processes and sanitizes raw input punctuation before applying rules.

references.rationale: Directly cites the ChromeStatus reference link in the 'see also' section.

design_system.rationale: Fully adheres to the design system, and declares both background and color properties on all button state overrides.
